# omni Provider

The Omni provider manages resources on a Siderolabs Omni instance via its COSI resource and management APIs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    omni = {
      source = "siderolabs/omni"
    }
  }
}

provider "omni" {
  endpoint = "https://instance.omni.siderolabs.io"
  # service_account_key is sourced from the OMNI_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY environment variable.
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) Omni API endpoint, e.g. `https://instance.omni.siderolabs.io`. May also be set via the `OMNI_ENDPOINT` environment variable.
- `insecure_skip_tls_verify` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification when connecting to the Omni endpoint. Not recommended outside of development.
- `service_account_key` (String, Sensitive) Base64-encoded Omni service account key. May also be set via the `OMNI_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY` environment variable.
